prose: The Fukui electrophilicity index for the most electrophilic site (C atom) of formaldehyde was calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level with the tier 'standard' setting in the gas phase. The computed value is approximately 0.596. The calculation was performed with the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill, explicitly using the specified method, functional, basis set, and charge/multiplicity parameters.
